description_long: This is a striking blue sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and aggressive styling. The body features a prominent black hood with red accent lines running from the front to the rear, enhancing its dynamic appearance. Large air intakes and sculpted side skirts are visible, suggesting high-performance engineering and advanced cooling. The rear is equipped with a large, elevated spoiler and a detailed diffuser, emphasizing its racing pedigree. The wheels are black with a multi-spoke design, and the windows are tinted dark for a sleek, modern look. The overall design is reminiscent of high-end hypercars, built for speed and agility in urban or track environments.
description: A blue, low-profile sports car with black and red accents, large rear spoiler, and aggressive aerodynamic features. It has black multi-spoke wheels and a sleek, high-performance design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the large spoiler, black diffuser, and dual exhausts, with blue body and red accents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sculpted side skirts, large rear wing, and black multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the aggressive headlights, black hood with red stripes, and wide stance.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the aerodynamic lines, side intakes, and prominent spoiler.
attribute_wheel_design: black multi-spoke rims with a split-spoke pattern
